text: You see the Ford layoff news? Third round this year and half these guys are Dearborn neighbors. Shop's already getting calls about fleet maintenance - people holding onto vehicles longer now.
Yeah it's rough. You think parts supply takes a hit too or mostly just the workforce side of things?
Probably both. Omar flagged delays on a couple GM components this week already. We'll manage but next month could get interesting. Anyway - Eagles practice still on at Hemlock tomorrow at 5?
Should be, Coach Ray confirmed it this morning. Don't forget the equipment bag this time lol
